title: retry-helper — retry a failing call with bounded exponential backoff
body: Wrap any call and retry it on RETRYABLE errors only (timeouts, 429, 5xx). Bounded by max_attempts; waits with exponential backoff + full jitter between tries; honors an idempotency key so a retried write is not duplicated; raises immediately on non-retryable errors (4xx other than 429, auth failures).
completeness: complete — max_attempts ceiling, backoff+jitter, idempotency-key handling, retryable/fatal split
correctness: correct — never busy-loops; only retries retryable classes
